title: Shelly.
content:
We have scarcely time to tell thee
            Of the strange and gifted Shelly,
            Kind hearted man but ill-fated,
            So youthful, drowned and cremated.
meaning:
James McIntyre's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Shelly."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
